type_error_policy: Cairoon file APIs accept MoonBit UTF-8 String paths only. Python bytes and __fspath__ coercion do not transfer; embedded NUL is checked at the FFI boundary and raises CairoInvalidArgument(InvalidString, _).

runtime: src/tests/image/png/surface_png_test.mbt::image surface png file roundtrip and invalid paths
static_api: pub fn Surface::image_from_png(String) -> Self raise CairoError
pub fn Surface::write_to_png(Self, String) -> Unit raise CairoError
test_fspaths.adaptation: MoonBit String directly covers ordinary and Unicode paths. Python bytes and path-like protocol objects are rejected by the type checker; embedded NUL reaches the checked native wrapper and maps to InvalidString without creating a file.
